---
title: "Labs"
---

These will be updated daily before lab.

<!--
## Capstone project

[Guidelines](https://36-sure.github.io/2025/sports/project/description.html)
-->

<!--
## Labs


Note: To download a `.qmd` file, right click and choose "Save Link As...".

| Date   | Title                                  | Materials                                                                                                                                          |
|--------|----------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| June 1 | Getting started with `R`               | [`.html`](sports/labs/01-intro.html) &nbsp; [`.qmd`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/36-SURE/2025/main/sports/labs/01-intro.qmd)                 |
| June 3 | Data wrangling                         | [`.html`](sports/labs/02-wrangling.html) &nbsp; [`.qmd`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/36-SURE/2025/main/sports/labs/02-wrangling.qmd)         |
| June 4 | Data visualization                     | [`.html`](sports/labs/03-visualization.html) &nbsp; [`.qmd`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/36-SURE/2025/main/sports/labs/03-visualization.qmd) |
| June 5 | Using GitHub for project collaboration | [`.html`](sports/labs/04-github.qmd)                                                                                                               |
| June 23 | Data wrangling with data.table | [`.html`](sports/labs/05-datatable.qmd)&nbsp; [`.qmd`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/36-SURE/2025/main/sports/labs/05-datatable.qmd)   |

## EDA projects

|           |                  |                                            |
|-----------|------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| Project 1 | NFL passing      | [description](sports/eda/nfl_passing.qmd)  |
| Project 2 | UFA throwing     | [description](sports/eda/ufa_throwing.qmd) |
| Project 3 | TBD              | [description](sports/eda/nhl_shooting.qmd) |
| Project 4 | FIFAWWC shooting | [description](sports/eda/wwc_shooting.qmd) |
| Project 5 | FIFAWWC passing  | [description](sports/eda/wwc_passing.qmd)  |
| Project 6 | TBD              | [description](sports/eda/mlb_batting.qmd)  |
-->
